# 发现了一个免费的Obsidian的同步插件

---

原文链接: [https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?\_\_biz=MzA3MzE0MjgxMQ==&mid=265088...](https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?__biz=MzA3MzE0MjgxMQ==&mid=2650887893&idx=1&sn=2003517ffdb9912a1e1ab9bf1effcea0&chksm=84e671a1b391f8b717023ef4a3634083400a8d822cc8ff36aa2efbbd9649b9bab60f8fb39419&exptype=servicebox_1782612224227812&subscene=0&scene=288&clicktime=1782612249&enterid=1782612249&flutter_pos=1&biz_enter_id=5&ascene=56&devicetype=iOS26.5&version=18004b2d&nettype=3G+&abtest_cookie=AAACAA==&lang=en&countrycode=CN&fontScale=115&exportkey=n_&pass_ticket=ziTUBnuKuI74B4vYVh/54KvRmmopS397VkpYpgh5xAqntpU3eVKSRi2DamxDgu43&wx_header=3)

![](.evernote-content/44A1C763-86B7-4893-9DBA-1F28C68B5886/17BA0DEE-868A-4F01-965E-9AD8070DBDDD.png)![](.evernote-content/44A1C763-86B7-4893-9DBA-1F28C68B5886/C707253F-37B3-4D9E-AF73-34FC6E82D6B4.png)![](.evernote-content/44A1C763-86B7-4893-9DBA-1F28C68B5886/10FE2F37-3B0D-405E-A06D-768323A0FC55.png)![](.evernote-content/44A1C763-86B7-4893-9DBA-1F28C68B5886/E312F144-8078-41F8-981F-31D078DCD45B.png)

使用方法：

CMD + P打开命令面板。

把 链接批量导入，支持一次粘贴多个链接。

然后，点击确认就可以啦。

Close
